name: GH_SimplificationMode
summary: Enumerates the possible data structure simplification modes.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Specifies no simplification is to take place.

enum_values.name: CollapseLeadingOverlaps
enum_values.summary: Only overlaps at the leading portion of paths will be simplified.

enum_values.name: CollapseAllOverlaps
enum_values.summary: Overlaps along the entire span of the paths will be simplified.
